elements.sent-2411-001: Circular-arc graphs are the intersection graphs of arcs of a circle.
elements.sent-2411-002: The main result of this work describes the structure of all normalized intersection models of circular-arc graphs.
elements.sent-2411-003: Normalized models of a circular-arc graph reflect the neighborhood relation between its vertices and can be seen as its canonical representations; in particular, any intersection model can be made normalized by possibly extending some of its arcs.
elements.sent-2411-004: We~devise a data-structure, called PQM-tree, that maintains the set of all normalized models of a circular-arc graph.
elements.sent-2411-005: We show that the PQM-tree of a circular-arc graph can be computed in linear time.
elements.sent-2411-006: Finally, basing on PQM-trees, we provide a linear-time algorithm for the canonization and the isomorphism problem for circular-arc graphs.
elements.sent-2411-007: We describe the structure of the normalized models of circular-arc graphs using an approach proposed by Hsu~[SIAM J.. Comput.
elements.sent-2411-008: In the aforementioned work, Hsu claimed the construction of decomposition trees representing the set of all normalized intersection models of circular-arc graphs and an $\Oh{nm}$ time isomorphism algorithm for this class of graphs.
elements.sent-2411-009: However, the counterexample given in~[Discrete Math.. Theor.
elements.sent-2411-010: Sci., 15(1), 157--182, 2013] shows that Hsu's isomorphism algorithm is not incorrect.
elements.sent-2411-011: Also, due to the errors pointed out in~\cite{Kra24appendix , the decomposition trees proposed by Hsu are not constructed correctly; in particular, we showed that there are circular-arc graphs whose all normalized models do not follow the description given by Hsu.}
elements.sent-2411-012: We~devise a data-structure, called PQSM-tree, that maintains the set of all normalized models of a circular-arc graph.
elements.sent-2411-013: We show that the PQSM-tree of a circular-arc graph can be computed in linear time.
elements.sent-2411-014: Finally, basing on PQSM-trees, we provide a linear-time algorithm for the canonization and the isomorphism problem for circular-arc graphs.
elements.sent-2411-015: In the aforementioned work, Hsu claimed the construction of decomposition trees representing the set of all normalized intersection models of circular-arc graphs and an~$\Oh{nm}$ time isomorphism algorithm for this class of graphs.
elements.sent-2411-016: Sci., 15(1), 157--182, 2013] shows that Hsu's isomorphism algorithm is incorrect.
elements.sent-2411-017: We sincerely thank Janek Derbisz and Stefan Felsner for their valuable comments on this manuscript.. \bibliographystyle{plain.}
